description_long: This bungalow features a prominent red-tiled hip roof with a large overhang, providing shade to the surrounding porch and entry areas. The structure is primarily white with wooden accents, including a spacious covered veranda and a pergola on one side, ideal for outdoor seating or parking. The front facade has two large windows and a central entrance, while the side and rear elevations reveal additional covered porches and wooden railings. The building sits on a flat, paved base, suggesting integration into an urban or suburban neighborhood. The windows are rectangular and symmetrically arranged on the main facade, with additional windows and doors visible on the sides. The overall design is simple yet functional, with a focus on outdoor living spaces and sheltered walkways.
description: A single-story white bungalow with a red-tiled hip roof, wooden porch, and a side pergola, featuring large windows and a spacious veranda.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two large windows, and the attached pergola on the right.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the hip roof, front steps, and the full extent of the pergola structure.
description_view_2: Side-rear view displaying the covered porch, additional windows, and the rear entryway.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back wall, rear porch, and the side pergola structure.
